19 The motion of defendant University of California Hastings College of the Law for an
20 || order to dismiss the within action on the ground that said defendant’s demurrer was sustained
21 || with leave to amend on May 8, 2003, that notice thereof was made on said date and that an
22 || amended complaint was not filed within the time required by law, came on for hearing on ex
23 || parte application of said defendant, John J. Murray, Esq., appearing for moving party and
24 JO __ OV appearing for plaintiff, and for good cause shown
5 IT IS ORDERED that this action be and is hereby dismissed for failure of plaintiff to file
26 || an amended complaint after demurrer to the complaint was sustained with leave to amend;
27 IT IS FURTHER ORDERED that defendant University of California Hastings College of
28 || Law shall be entitled to recover its costs of suit herein.
